zh.lifeSummary: 當Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan於1165年出生在威爾士安格萊希迪 度拉斯時，她的父親Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules16歲，母親Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys1歲。她於大約1240年與Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes在英國威爾斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1260年在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊享年96歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan于1165年出生在威尔士安格萊希迪 度拉斯时，她的父亲Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules16岁，母亲Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys1岁。她于大约1240年与Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes在英国威尔斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1260年在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德坎布萊享年96岁。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Fychan
meanings: Welsh: A Welsh name of great antiquity, from vyckan, little, small; i.e. small in stature. Compare the surname Bychan and the Armoric Le Bihan.

nameMeanings.name: Gwenllian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: from gwen, the feminine form of gwyn ‘white, fair; blessed, holy’ ( see Gwen ) + lliant ‘flood, flow’ (probably in the transferred sense ‘foamy’ or ‘white’, referring to a pale complexion).

en.lifeSummary: When Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan was born in 1165, in City Dulas, Anglesey, Wales, her father, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, was 16 and her mother, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, was 1. She married Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes about 1240, in Wales, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1260, in Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 96.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan est née en 1165, à City Dulas, Anglesey, Galles, son père, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, avait 1 ans. Elle a épousé Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes environ 1240, à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1260, à Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 96 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan 1165 in City Dulas, Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules 16 und ihre Mutter Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys 1. Sie hat um 1240 in Wales, United Kingdom Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1260 im Alter von 96 Jahren in Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan è nata il nel 1165 nel City Dulas, Anglesey, Galles, sua padre, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, aveva 1 anni. Lei sposato Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes circa 1240, nel Galles, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1260, nel Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 96 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychanが1165年にウェールズアングレセイシトイ ダラスで生まれた時，父Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dulesは16歳，母Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhysは1歳であった。約1240年にイギリスウェールズでGwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1260年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードカンブレイで96歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan(이)가 1165년 웨일스 앤글레시 시티 드룰아스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys(은)는 1세였다. 그녀는 대략 1240년 영국 웨일스에서 Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1260년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 캄브라이에서 96세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan nasceu em 1165, em City Dulas, Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, tinha 1 anos. Ela casou-se com Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes aproximadamente 1240, em Gales, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1260, em Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 96 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan родилась в 1165 г. в местности сити дулас, англеси, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, 1. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes около 1240 г. в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1260 г. в местности камбреи, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 96 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gwenllian verch Ednyfed Fychan nació en 1165, en City Dulas, Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Ednyfed Fychan ap Cynwrig of Dules, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Gwenllian II ferch Lord Rhys, tenía 1 años. Se casó con Gwrwared ap Gwilym of Camaes aproximadamente 1240, en Gales, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1260, en Cambrai, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 96 años.
